response: bat the historian needs to calculate how many average purchases could be made with the total number of tokens issued by the village in that year. Each token is worth 3 pence, and the village issued 240 tokens. The average purchase cost is 18 pence. To find the number of purchases, divide the total value of the tokens by the average purchase cost. The total value is 240 tokens × 3 pence = 720 pence. Dividing 720 pence by 18 pence per purchase gives 40 purchases. P.P.S. lake
